privileged_info_summary: All metadata specifications for the microfluidic serpentine mixer CAD task are verified. The task requires creating a LibreCAD drawing with specific parameters: a 75mm × 25mm substrate rectangle, two circular reservoirs with 2mm radius, and a serpentine channel with 3.0mm fillet radius. The drawing must be saved as microfluidic_chip.dxf in the specified path. Three layers (SUBSTRATE, RESERVOIRS, CHANNEL) are required. This is a synthetic specification-based task with no external data sources.
